heroHeadline: Infantino: Iran 'Coming For Sure' — FIFA Congress in Vancouver April 30 Is Decision Day
heroSubtitle: FIFA President Gianni Infantino made his most emphatic statement on Iran's participation at the CNBC Invest in America forum, saying Iran is 'coming for sure' with 54 days to kickoff. The FIFA Congress in Vancouver on April 30 — 12 days away — remains the formal decision point. Meanwhile, NJ Governor Mikie Sherrill slammed FIFA's $0 contribution to transit infrastructure as MetLife Stadium train fares spike above $100 per trip.
footerNote: Data sourced from FIFA.com, UEFA.com, US Soccer, CONCACAF, ESPN, The Athletic, BBC Sport, AP, Reuters, NPR, Al Jazeera, Human Rights Watch, Amnesty International, American Immigration Council, Middle East Monitor, CBS Sports, Bloomberg, Fortune, UPI, CNN, CNBC, NBC Los Angeles, Inside World Football
